name: construction contractors managing 5–10 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, budget overruns cause cash flow gaps. We provide real-time budget tracking instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.
problem_solved: Inability to effectively track project budgets and variances.
